carpet-sru-addition.rule.allaySilentReso: If enabled, note blocks blocked by a block above will still emit the note block game event for Allays.
carpet-sru-addition.rule.allayThrowCoold: Overrides the allay item pickup cooldown after throwing. Use -1 for vanilla (60 ticks).
carpet-sru-addition.rule.allayMaxHearing: Overrides the maximum distance at which Allays can hear note blocks. Use -1 for vanilla (16 blocks).
